# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Blob Storage to store application logs and backups. Configure for standard performance tier with default access settings. Skip lifecycle management policies for now to keep the template simple. This is for our logging infrastructure.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud storage security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

parameters:
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the storage account
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "eastus"
    metadata:
      description: Location for the storage account

variables:
  storageAccountType: "Standard_LRS"
  blobContainerName: "application-logs"
  backupContainerName: "backups"

resources:
- type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
  apiVersion: "2021-04-01"
  name: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  sku:
    name: "[variables('storageAccountType')]"
  kind: "StorageV2"
  properties:
    accessTier: "Hot"
    allowBlobPublicAccess: false
    minimumTlsVersion: "TLS1_2"
    supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
    encryption:
      services:
        blob:
          enabled: true
        file:
          enabled: true
      keySource: "Microsoft.Storage"
    networkAcls:
      defaultAction: "Deny"
      bypass: "AzureServices"
    blobServices:
      cors:
        corsRules: []
      defaultServiceVersion: "2020-08-04"
      containerDeleteRetentionPolicy:
        enabled: true
        days: 7
    fileServices:
      shareDeleteRetentionPolicy:
        enabled: true
        days: 7

- type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers
  apiVersion: "2021-04-01"
  name: "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default/', variables('blobContainerName'))]"
  dependsOn:
    - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
  properties:
    publicAccess: "None"
    immutableStorageWithVersioning:
      enabled: false
    defaultEncryptionScope: "$account-key"
    denyEncryptionScopeOverride: true

- type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers
  apiVersion: "2021-04-01"
  name: "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default/', variables('backupContainerName'))]"
  dependsOn:
    - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
  properties:
    publicAccess: "None"
    immutableStorageWithVersioning:
      enabled: false
    defaultEncryptionScope: "$account-key"
    denyEncryptionScopeOverride: true

outputs:
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
  logsContainerName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('blobContainerName')]"
  backupContainerName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('backupContainerName')]"
  storageAccountPrimaryKey:
    type: string
    value: "[listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2021-04-01').keys[0].value]"
    copy:
      count: 1
      input: "[listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2021-04-01').keys[0].value]"
